sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 12.58 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.12)

statement.latex: A generalized quadrangle\/$GQ(s,t)$with parameters$s, t$is by definition an incidence system consisting of points and lines in which every line consists of$s + 1$points, every two different lines have at most one common point, each point belongs to$t + 1$lines, and for any point$a$not lying on a line$L$there is a unique line containing$a$and intersecting$L$. [r]{a)} Does$GQ(4,11)$exist? [r]{b)} Ca...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
